293ab062993081539902f1c0cf8d6d6d.title: Moravian - BA Psychology Viability - Research Report
293ab062993081539902f1c0cf8d6d6d.characteristics: Well-Being Psychology - Feasibility and Guidance report

2b1ab06299308066acc9dcba920db5a0.title: Moravian - Checkpoint 1 - Due 11/30/25
2b1ab06299308066acc9dcba920db5a0.characteristics: By Nov 30, EAB must agree to the FY24-25 SPSI budget projections, volume projections, and cost-per-student model that Rhodes Advisors and SPSI leadership are finalizing. This will serve as the financial baseline for measuring performance and pacing. All SPSI programs fully reactivated across paid and organic journeys. Initial improvements to attribution and source tracking.

2b1ab06299308083b020ffce51a097d9.title: Moravian - Checkpoint 2 - Due 1/28/26
2b1ab06299308083b020ffce51a097d9.characteristics: January 28: Full implementation of Rhodes Advisors-provided creative, landing pages, and messaging. CRM workflows updated to match SPSI’s journey mapping. Tracking alignment across EAB and the secondary vendor to enable February funnel clarity.

2b1ab062993080bea721de915fa19782.title: Moravian - Checkpoint 3 - Due 2/26/26
2b1ab062993080bea721de915fa19782.characteristics: By February 26: Clear progress in lead volume, CPL, and early conversion quality. Positive pacing toward Fall 2025 enrollment targets. Weekly program-level funnel reporting begins. February becomes the first unified view of lead → application → student performance. If progress is insufficient, Moravian begins drafting vendor transition contracts for a September 1 takeover or earlier if necessary.

2b1ab062993080bcb96bd9d5871956bc.title: Moravian - Post February Oversight - Ongoing
2b1ab062993080bcb96bd9d5871956bc.characteristics: Post-February Oversight: Weekly Performance Reviews — Rhodes Advisors and Moravian will jointly review SPSI performance every week, focused on lead volume, CPL, conversion quality, and pacing toward Fall 2025 goals. Financial Stewardship — All performance evaluations measured against the SPSI budget, volume projections, and cost-per-student model agreed to by EAB and shared with Moravian leadership. Pipeline Health Monitoring — SPSI must demonstrate consistent inquiry growth, improved lead quality, and stable funnel movement. Fail-Safe Protocol — If progress stalls, Moravian will escalate toward transition planning with vendor contracts drafted in parallel. Clear Ownership Model — Justine Bartholomew (institutional lead) and Rhodes Advisors (strategic/performance lead) jointly own EAB coordination and KPI management.

2b1ab06299308040a986fb71a7b5dcfb.title: Moravian - Executive Rec Memo (EAB)
2b1ab06299308040a986fb71a7b5dcfb.characteristics: Email Lee sent to SLT (Bryon, Dee, Scott) wrapping up the full assessment of EAB in relation to SPSI marketing and enrollment operations. Provides a clear, evidence-based plan with a checkpoint model giving Moravian the structure, pace, and accountability to monitor EAB alignment while preserving SPSI agility if performance does not improve.

2a6ab06299308021a606df8e0d98843d.title: Moravian - New JD - AVP of Graduate & Adult Enrollment

68daf4b6dfda478da19ff19ca7ee5db0.title: Moravian - Finance Validation v1.1 (Aviation) - Input Validation
68daf4b6dfda478da19ff19ca7ee5db0.characteristics: Updated CAC & conversion data tables. Revised enrollment targets. Validated tuition and retention inputs.

eeaa9eb84cca4ec297999acffc334b80.title: Moravian - Finance Validation v1.1 (Aviation) - Develop ROI Model
eeaa9eb84cca4ec297999acffc334b80.characteristics: Reconstructed financial model (Excel/Sheets). ROI summary by program & channel. Baseline forecast and staffing cost integration.

82d046a3c8ed4d529653df509b830eee.title: Moravian - Finance Validation v1.1 (Aviation) - Review, Test, Refine
82d046a3c8ed4d529653df509b830eee.characteristics: Final validated financial model. Scenario summary and recommendations. Brief training session and model documentation.

2a3ab062993080fa8696e2ec1b0cd978.title: Moravian - M1: Archer Management & Vendor Oversight
2a3ab062993080fa8696e2ec1b0cd978.characteristics: Establish daily/weekly performance cadence with EAB. Create shared KPI dashboards and vendor scorecards. Define SLA thresholds and corrective process. Outcomes: vendor performance cadence, EAB/vendor accountability framework, weekly reporting rhythm.

2a3ab062993080c29343ea49337098d7.title: Moravian - M2: Enrollment Operations & Funnel Management
2a3ab062993080c29343ea49337098d7.characteristics: Implement joint funnel reporting (Marketing + Enrollment). Standardize lead management in Salesforce. Align data handoffs between EAB, Marketing, and Enrollment. Outcomes: unified enrollment dashboard, funnel health report, shared accountability metrics.

2a3ab06299308050aa70e16a1e8c4412.title: Moravian - M3: Process Optimization & Team Enablement
2a3ab06299308050aa70e16a1e8c4412.characteristics: Improve workflows for admissions processing, data sync, and lead handling. Train teams on KPI review process. Introduce system audits and data quality checks. Outcomes: updated process documentation, audit logs, team training materials.

2a3ab062993080e78a79c16f0387ecbe.title: Moravian - M1: Student Journey Mapping & Optimization
2a3ab062993080e78a79c16f0387ecbe.characteristics: Audit our new end-to-end journey (Inquiry → Enrollment → Onboarding). Identify friction points, response delays, and content gaps. Develop updated journey model with optimized touchpoints. Outcomes: student journey map, optimization brief, KPI alignment for each stage.

2a3ab06299308067b76fd32d5c46b0d4.title: Moravian - M2: Program Discovery Synthesis Report
2a3ab06299308067b76fd32d5c46b0d4.characteristics: Conduct discovery sessions with program directors (MBA, Cybersecurity, Well-Being Psychology, BBA). Capture program differentiators, audience insights, and competitive positioning. Review external market data (Lightcast, Environmental Scan) to identify value propositions and competitive whitespace. Document alignment opportunities between program strengths and regional workforce trends. Outcome: synthesis reports.

2a3ab062993080d5a36fe4312e0fc1ed.title: Moravian - M3: Messaging Framework & GTM Foundation
2a3ab062993080d5a36fe4312e0fc1ed.characteristics: Develop SPSI brand narrative and messaging hierarchy across school and program levels. Identify shared themes (ROI, flexibility, industry relevance) and program-specific differentiators. Begin creative brief and campaign architecture outlining key audiences and tone of voice. Align early messaging with comm flow structure (awareness → inquiry). Outcomes: SPSI messaging framework and narrative hierarchy, draft creative brief and tone-of-voice guide, updated content map linking programs to audience segments, executive level presentation.

2a3ab0629930803cb96cdbee3e42ccb2.title: Moravian - M4: Creative Strategy & Media Plan
2a3ab0629930803cb96cdbee3e42ccb2.characteristics: Translate messaging framework into creative strategy (ad concepts, landing pages, web updates). Develop media plan (paid, owned, and earned channels) with spend allocation by program and audience. Align creative sequencing to funnel stages (top-of-funnel awareness → inquiry capture). Coordinate with EAB on channel readiness, performance expectations, and tracking setup. Outcomes: creative and campaign framework, media plan and channel sequencing strategy, launch readiness checklist.

2a3ab062993080a68b55c905191144e2.title: Moravian - M5: Campaign Prep & Early Activation
2a3ab062993080a68b55c905191144e2.characteristics: Tasks in scope (all programs): Meta ads — Instagram & Facebook creative (all required image sizes); Landing page designs — high-fidelity designs ready for build; Email sequence assets — HTML and hi-fi designs for 7 emails tied to student journey map / communications map; Website copy — new copy for SPSI, MBA, BBA, and Psych matching current templates; Mock-up of lead form — high-fidelity design aligned to campaign strategy and CRM requirements.

2a3ab0629930804983aec08088ae3c95.title: Moravian - M6: Full Launch & Optimization Readiness
2a3ab0629930804983aec08088ae3c95.characteristics: Fully activate top-of-funnel campaigns across all paid and organic channels. Begin weekly performance reviews of lead volume, quality, and cost metrics. Feed early campaign data into KPI dashboard for live monitoring. Prepare optimization brief for next phase (conversion-stage creative and communications). Outcomes: top-of-funnel campaigns live (4 programs + SPSI brand), initial performance report and KPI dashboard connection, optimization and next-phase plan.

2a3ab06299308017aef5df570bbc1078.title: Moravian - M1: Input Validation & Market Alignment
2a3ab06299308017aef5df570bbc1078.characteristics: Work with Anna to align the financial model with live marketing and enrollment realities. Reconcile initial projections with verified cost-per-lead (CPL), cost-per-application (CPA), and conversion rate benchmarks emerging from marketing discovery. Audit tuition, discount, and retention assumptions to reflect updated program data and student behavior patterns. Identify deltas between prior growth assumptions and achievable marketing performance. Outcomes: updated financial model inputs reflecting verified market data, reconciliation report, summary of enrollment and revenue alignment with marketing projections.

2a3ab06299308095a3b0f99efa37be1d.title: Moravian - M2: Model Refinement & Scenario Development
2a3ab06299308095a3b0f99efa37be1d.characteristics: Incorporate verified marketing performance metrics (lead flow, cost efficiency, yield) into model scenarios. Create Baseline, Target, and Stretch models showing outcomes under varied spend and conversion conditions. Conduct sensitivity testing to identify inflection points for spend vs. yield efficiency. Establish cross-functional review cadence between marketing, finance, and enrollment. Outcomes: rebuilt financial model with market-informed assumptions, scenario testing outputs (Baseline/Target/Stretch), leadership review materials linking marketing data to revenue forecasts.

2a3ab0629930806db023cd9b2260a564.title: Moravian - M3: KPI Definition & Reporting Framework
2a3ab0629930806db023cd9b2260a564.characteristics: Define operational KPIs that align marketing activity with enrollment yield and revenue generation. Map metrics across systems (Salesforce, EAB, paid media, finance dashboards). Collaborate with Mark and Lee to scope the dashboard build for Phase 3, ensuring data pipelines and ownership are clear. Establish performance cadence for weekly and monthly reporting cycles. Outcomes: KPI definition document and ownership map, integrated data alignment plan, initial KPI dashboard prototype and reporting cadence.

2a3ab06299308049b46af7717638b2cc.title: Moravian - M4: Program Launch & Campaign Development
2a3ab06299308049b46af7717638b2cc.characteristics: Translate discovery into creative and campaign assets. Build landing pages, ads, and comm flows. Begin pilot marketing activation for both programs. Outcomes: creative + comms toolkit, launch-ready campaign assets, program activation plan.

2bfab0629930809899d9f3dc81908f8d.title: Moravian - MS Cybersecurity - Market Analysis Report
2bfab0629930809899d9f3dc81908f8d.characteristics: Assessment of the labor market for Moravian's MS Cyber program: NYC vs Eastern PA. Recommendation: focus on Eastern PA.

2a8ab062993080ac97f0c9c3999afaf8.title: Moravian - M1: Data Source Access
2a8ab062993080ac97f0c9c3999afaf8.characteristics: Get access to key data sources such as Google Analytics and Search Console, Salesforce, and EAB data. Outcome: enable data pipelines and data aggregation.

2a8ab0629930805aa0aad652c6337e0f.title: Moravian - M2: Standardize Taxonomy and Tagging
2a8ab0629930805aa0aad652c6337e0f.characteristics: Review and standardize source tagging to enable descriptive and accurate data presentation. Outcome: standard and gapless taxonomy.

2a8ab06299308070abe4fb91511bc85f.title: Moravian - M3: Dashboard v1
2a8ab06299308070abe4fb91511bc85f.characteristics: Build a complete minable and visualized dashboard of funnel across all sources. Outcome: v1 Dashboard.

2a8ab062993080c8ad97daa3fcba8b75.title: Moravian - M4: First Installment, Insights and Recommendations
2a8ab062993080c8ad97daa3fcba8b75.characteristics: Analyze aggregated data. Develop and present insights and recommendations. Outcome: insights and recommendations report, first of quarterly cadence.

29eab0629930808ea7dadcc968572f80.title: Moravian - Finance Validation - Kickoff
29eab0629930808ea7dadcc968572f80.characteristics: Kickoff summary. Project timeline and data request list. Confirmed scope and expectations.

29eab0629930804abeccf3f7b038e966.title: Moravian - Finance Validation - Input Validation
29eab0629930804abeccf3f7b038e966.characteristics: Updated CAC & conversion data tables. Revised enrollment targets. Validated tuition and retention inputs.

29eab062993080d9a1b6e8c8b88bd372.title: Moravian - Finance Validation - Develop ROI Model
29eab062993080d9a1b6e8c8b88bd372.characteristics: Reconstructed financial model (Excel/Sheets). ROI summary by program & channel. Baseline forecast and staffing cost integration.

29eab06299308057b574d4851e3f1dcd.title: Moravian - Finance Validation - Review, Test, Refine
29eab06299308057b574d4851e3f1dcd.characteristics: Final validated financial model. Scenario summary and recommendations. Brief training session and model documentation.

29eab0629930804fb054f352b652c0df.title: Moravian - Finance Validation - Presentation and Transition
29eab0629930804fb054f352b652c0df.characteristics: Final model delivery. Summary presentation deck. Roadmap for ongoing financial management.

34aab0629930808d9e2fd3fb3e25fa3b.title: Enrollment Leadership Email Campaign
34aab0629930808d9e2fd3fb3e25fa3b.characteristics: Enrollment leadership email campaign to act as "second voice" to SEM and help drive funnel activity. Email campaign developed and implemented into Moravian's Salesforce instance.

34aab062993080fb9779d1f9d16012e6.title: Weekly Enrollment Performance Report SPSI
34aab062993080fb9779d1f9d16012e6.characteristics: Weekly performance funnel report for all SPSI programs. Provides insights on funnel movement from previous week and priorities for the upcoming week. Report goes out to SPSI leadership, MU President, MU Provost.

34aab062993080ce98bddc5d6e4f5c25.title: Pipeline Review Dashboard SPSI
34aab062993080ce98bddc5d6e4f5c25.characteristics: Dashboard for AVP & SEM to review pipeline activity. Custom report for each dashboard widget representing information per segmentation of funnel. Dashboard created in MU Salesforce instance specific for SPSI programs.

34aab06299308049b31be92174d08bee.title: Financial Aid Changes Communication Strategy
34aab06299308049b31be92174d08bee.characteristics: Financial Aid Changes Communication Strategy for MU SPSI Programs. Strategy includes: what the changes are and who it impacts, program-specific strategy for SPSI, suggested campaign sequencing and CTA.

34bab06299308009b95ec6826f1de160.title: Financial Aid Change Email Campaign by SPSI Program
34bab06299308009b95ec6826f1de160.characteristics: Program-specific 7-email sequence educating prospective SPSI students of the financial aid changes. Program-specific emails for each SPSI program, all sequences based on the master strategy document.

34bab0629930807ebc5ad2ee7d8dd6e3.title: Enrollment Training SEM Playbook
34bab0629930807ebc5ad2ee7d8dd6e3.characteristics: A resource guide for Student Experience Mentors outlining: managing the full enrollment funnel, step-by-step stage processes, explanation of admit automation, communication best practices, KPIs, operational procedures.

34bab0629930804995d8d86b6475820f.title: Moravian Salesforce Resource Guide
34bab0629930804995d8d86b6475820f.characteristics: A step-by-step reference guide for Student Experience Mentors covering: Salesforce navigation, funnel stage definitions, list views explanation and usage, outreach cadences by funnel stage, contact record management, dashboards use and explanation, email/SMS templates, operational workflows specific to Moravian University.

34bab062993080e5a697ca86e96aa811.title: SPSI Program Guides (for Archer Onboarding)
34bab062993080e5a697ca86e96aa811.characteristics: Program Overview Guides listing out: credit, cost, value proposition, curriculum, career outcomes, admissions requirements. Set of program guides used for Archer onboarding across SPSI programs.

34bab062993080a78544d964f89f31a7.title: SPSI Program Call Scripts (for Archer Onboarding)
34bab062993080a78544d964f89f31a7.characteristics: Call Scripts by Program outlining: how to connect with the prospective student, questions to understand their goals, how to guide them to a natural next step in scheduling a follow-up or starting the application, and objection handling.

34bab062993080f58ca7d51778270abe.title: Historical Funnel Reporting (for Archer Onboarding)
34bab062993080f58ca7d51778270abe.characteristics: Historical Funnel Report providing baseline data and trend analysis for use during Archer onboarding.

34bab0629930801dbc8fcfe62c6ee2b2.title: SEM Salesforce Process Training: Withdraw Process / Will Not Complete
34bab0629930801dbc8fcfe62c6ee2b2.characteristics: SEM Salesforce training explaining the Inquiry Withdraw Process field and Introduction to Will Not Complete field. Includes deck and updated Salesforce guide with the new process.

34bab0629930804888aad8a1fb6c5534.title: Weekly Funnel Report (SPSI & Grad Core)
34bab0629930804888aad8a1fb6c5534.characteristics: Comprehensive report shared with Moravian leadership including: week-over-week funnel movement, weekly trend chart, FY dashboard (funnel details by cohort), and pacing report.

34bab0629930805f896ad6e2a6689829.title: Communication Plan
34bab0629930805f896ad6e2a6689829.characteristics: Structured communication plan for the enrollment team to ensure consistent, timely outreach to every prospective student. Outlines when and how to engage prospects from inquiry through enrollment, helping the team deliver the right message at the right time, offer proactive support, and maintain momentum through each funnel stage. Includes training slide deck.

34bab062993080d29635dde714449118.title: SPSI SEM Salesforce List Views
34bab062993080d29635dde714449118.characteristics: New list views (01_New → 06_Reachback) to structure how SPSI SEM and the team manage outreach and prioritize follow-up. Six lists organize SEM's pipeline, worked through daily in priority order: 1 — New Inquiries (highest priority); 2 — Uncontacted (no SEM contact in last 4 weeks); 3 — Contacted (verified and engaged); 4 — Applications (active for current and future terms); 5 — Recent Movement (behavioral signal); 6 — Reachback (opportunities >60 days old).

34bab0629930800c9df2edc8cc7e9e4e.title: Archer to MU Salesforce Mapping
34bab0629930800c9df2edc8cc7e9e4e.characteristics: Mapping of fields between MU Salesforce and Archer (and Archer Hub back to MU Salesforce) to support data exchange. Confirms requirements (e.g., visibility into transcript names and resume status without exposing actual documents).

34bab062993080388a76d7af5ea68e6c.title: MU Behavioral Science - Weekly Performance Report
34bab062993080388a76d7af5ea68e6c.characteristics: Weekly performance funnel report for all School of Behavioral Health (SoBACH) programs. Provides insights on funnel movement from previous week and priorities for the upcoming week. Report goes out to SoBACH leadership, MU President, MU Provost.

34bab062993080669354e8e7bf63e087.title: MU Education Programs - Weekly Performance Report
34bab062993080669354e8e7bf63e087.characteristics: Weekly performance funnel report for all School of Education programs. Provides insights on funnel movement from previous week and priorities for the upcoming week. Report goes out to School of Education leadership, MU President, MU Provost.

34bab0629930808d97eff54219afa1cd.title: M&E Board of Trustee Meeting (April 2026)
34bab0629930808d97eff54219afa1cd.characteristics: Contributed deck slides for BOT M&E Meeting on 4/9/26. Presented on SPSI Enrollment Performance Management tools and strategies. Traveled to campus for in-person BOT meeting.

2afab062993080489243c4705be7e728.title: Moravian - Fin. Model - Discovery & Technical Blueprint
2afab062993080489243c4705be7e728.characteristics: Review validated model outputs from Project 1. Map required system connections (CRM, dashboards, accounting). Define automation scope, refresh cadence, and user permissions. Draft technical blueprint and governance plan. Outcomes: technical architecture plan, data integration map, governance & update framework.

2afab0629930800b8191d520b99157d8.title: Moravian - Fin. Model - Assumptions Inputs & Calculation Automation
2afab0629930800b8191d520b99157d8.characteristics: Connect validated data sources (campaign, CRM, tuition). Develop automated or streamlined import processes. Build reconciliation protocols and variance checks. Test data integrity and performance. Outcomes: connected data pipelines, automated update workflow, QA report & validation log.

2afab062993080d5b9d1e4feb4acfe77.title: Moravian - Fin. Model - Model Architecture Rebuild
2afab062993080d5b9d1e4feb4acfe77.characteristics: Re-engineer model structure for modular term updates. Simplify logic, naming conventions, and dependencies. Establish standardized input templates and validation rules. Prepare framework for live data ingestion. Outcomes: rebuilt model core with modular inputs, documented calculation & logic framework.

2afab062993080859d40d104a18c4e3d.title: Moravian - Fin. Model - Forecasting & Scenario Planning
2afab062993080859d40d104a18c4e3d.characteristics: Embed "what-if" modules for spend, conversion, and retention variables. Add rolling forecast and variance analysis functionality. Build sensitivity tables for enrollment and pricing scenarios. Outcomes: scenario-planning engine, rolling forecast dashboard.

2afab0629930803588a7ffb5546dd9a2.title: Moravian - Fin. Model - Training, Launch & Transition
2afab0629930803588a7ffb5546dd9a2.characteristics: Deliver team walkthroughs and training materials. Finalize documentation for ongoing maintenance. Present model handoff and roadmap for continued optimization. Outcomes: final model delivery, training deck & manual, future enhancement roadmap.

2afab06299308066a020ce7233ee2381.title: Moravian - Fin. Model-to-Oracle Financial Reporting Summary
2afab06299308066a020ce7233ee2381.characteristics: Develop a summary page translating the model's P&L into Moravian's Oracle accounts and cost centers, aligning model outputs with institutional financial reporting. Outcomes: tested model outputs, user feedback summary.

2fdab062993080e786efc486fb92aace.title: Moravian - SPSI - Enrollment Miss Mitigation Plan
2fdab062993080e786efc486fb92aace.characteristics: Draft enrollment miss mitigation plan in collaboration with Jed, Joe, and Lee. Share drafted plan with MU Enrollment/Marketing Leader (Scott) for feedback and buy-in. Update plan based on Scott's feedback. Share finalized plan with SLT team.

2fdab0629930800bbe76ce327917e8a3.title: AI Recruitment Vendors - Develop and Deliver a Recommendation
2fdab0629930800bbe76ce327917e8a3.characteristics: Identify, review, and vet providers specializing in AI-informed call agents, enrollment advisors, and systems to increase top-of-funnel enrollment and recruitment engagement for Moravian's graduate and adult programs (SPSI). Goal: further qualify interest leads by nurturing them through initial outreach. Steps: identify possible vendors; engage vendors and secure demos; organize findings (pricing, implementation complexity, time to activate, flexibility) and draft recommendation.

2fdab062993080d2b30ad5f15bca6332.title: AI Recruitment Vendors - Evaluate Each Vendor
2fdab062993080d2b30ad5f15bca6332.characteristics: Vendor evaluation step within the broader AI recruitment vendor vetting effort: identify possible vendors, engage them and secure demos, then evaluate each based on capabilities, technology, and approach.
